note: golden_hash filled by golden-parity.test.mjs --update. Vector 1: standard within-limits DTI. Vector 2: exceeds manual-UW max, requires AUS. Vector 3: zero-income edge (finite gate).

vectors.name: standard_within_limits
vectors.description: $8,000 gross monthly income, $1,800 PITIA, $600 other debts, DU underwriting. Back-end 30% is within the standard-manual 36% band and well under the DU 50% max.

output_payload.regulatory_basis: Fannie Mae Selling Guide B3-6-02 (Debt-to-Income Ratios); Freddie Mac Single-Family Seller/Servicer Guide 5401.2 (Debt payment-to-income ratio)
output_payload.note: Front-end = housing payment (PITIA) / gross monthly income. Back-end = total monthly debt / gross monthly income. Tier bands are representative GSE manual-underwriting / AUS bands -- confirm against the current Selling Guide / Seller Guide and the specific AUS findings for the loan in question. Not check_agency_eligibility_matrix (art-222), which consumes this ratio as one of several eligibility checks.

vectors.name: exceeds_manual_max_needs_aus
vectors.description: $6,000 gross monthly income, $2,000 PITIA, $1,000 other debts, manual underwriting selected. Back-end 50% exceeds the manual 45% ceiling; tier shows du_lpa_only meaning an AUS approval (DU/LPA, 50% max) would be required.

output_payload.regulatory_basis: Fannie Mae Selling Guide B3-6-02 (Debt-to-Income Ratios); Freddie Mac Single-Family Seller/Servicer Guide 5401.2 (Debt payment-to-income ratio)
output_payload.note: Front-end = housing payment (PITIA) / gross monthly income. Back-end = total monthly debt / gross monthly income. Tier bands are representative GSE manual-underwriting / AUS bands -- confirm against the current Selling Guide / Seller Guide and the specific AUS findings for the loan in question. Not check_agency_eligibility_matrix (art-222), which consumes this ratio as one of several eligibility checks.

vectors.name: zero_income_edge
vectors.description: Zero gross monthly income. Finite gate must zero the ratios instead of producing Infinity/NaN and flag DTI_ZERO_INCOME.

output_payload.regulatory_basis: Fannie Mae Selling Guide B3-6-02 (Debt-to-Income Ratios); Freddie Mac Single-Family Seller/Servicer Guide 5401.2 (Debt payment-to-income ratio)
output_payload.note: Front-end = housing payment (PITIA) / gross monthly income. Back-end = total monthly debt / gross monthly income. Tier bands are representative GSE manual-underwriting / AUS bands -- confirm against the current Selling Guide / Seller Guide and the specific AUS findings for the loan in question. Not check_agency_eligibility_matrix (art-222), which consumes this ratio as one of several eligibility checks.
